actions.instruction: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.
actions.sourceText: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.

sourceText: Take a 30-40cm/12-16" length of red yarn, thread it into a yarn needle and weave it through the chain loops around the wreath, starting and ending at the join. Tie the ends in a bow, then cut them to the length you like.
title: Weave red yarn through chain loops and tie a bow
